sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14920" key="a)rdioqh/ra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρδῐοθήρα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ας</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄρδις</etym>) <sense id="n14920.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forceps to extract arrow-heads,</tr_> etc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Serv.</author> </bibl> ad Virg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Aen.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.453</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.404</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
